Hello Philip, 

Is this repocopy still relevant? According to PR ports/152191, the 
original problem reported in PR ports/151579 was due to incompatible 
versions in the different ports, which should not be an issue if the 
updates are performed at the same time. 

Regards, 
--  
Thierry Thomas.
